name: imdisk
description: Install ImDisk virtual disk driver and create a 10GB ramdisk at D: with boot-time activation.
verify: powershell.exe -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -NoProfile -NonInteractive -Command "${log} = Join-Path ${env:ProgramData} 'MAST\logs\imdisk-verify.log'; if (Test-Path 'C:\Windows\System32\imdisk.exe') { 'ImDisk installed successfully' | Out-File -FilePath ${log}; Set-Content -Path (Join-Path ${env:ProgramData} 'MAST\logs\imdisk-smoke.txt') -Value 'imdisk_ok' } else { 'ImDisk executable not found' | Out-File -FilePath ${log} -Encoding UTF8 }"
